Asset trees union across packages and compile at boot: shared owns the
stylesheet, web owns the module graph and the importmap. Templates get
the asset and importmap helpers contributed automatically.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require (
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/assetmapper v0.0.0
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates v0.0.0
)

replace (
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/assetmapper => ASSETSDIR
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates => TEMPLATEDIR
)
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- shared/assets.go --
package shared

import "embed"

//fabrik:assets
//go:embed all:assets
var Assets embed.FS
-- shared/assets/style.css --
body { background: url("./bg.png"); }
-- shared/assets/bg.png --
not-a-real-png
-- shared/templates.go --
package shared

import "embed"

//fabrik:templates
//go:embed all:templates
var Templates embed.FS
-- shared/templates/_default/_layout.html --
<html><head><link rel="stylesheet" href="{{ asset "style.css" }}">{{ importmap "app" }}</head>{{ block "content" . }}{{ end }}</html>
-- shared/templates/_default/home.html --
{{ define "content" }}<h1>home</h1>{{ end }}
-- web/assets.go --
package web

import "embed"

//fabrik:assets
//go:embed all:assets
var Assets embed.FS
-- web/assets/app.js --
import { nav } from "./nav.js";
nav();
-- web/assets/nav.js --
export function nav() {}
-- web/assets/importmap.json --
{
  "app": {"path": "app.js", "entrypoint": true}
}
-- web/web.go --
package web

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates"
)

type Handlers struct {
	Templates *templates.Set
}

//fabrik:http GET /{$}
func (h *Handlers) Home(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	h.Templates.Render(w, "home", nil)
}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"context"
	"errors"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"os/signal"
	"syscall"
	"time"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/assetmapper"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/router"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates"

	"app/shared"
	"app/web"
)

func run() (err error) {
	ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
	defer cancel()
	defer func() {
		if errors.Is(err, context.Canceled) && ctx.Err() != nil {
			err = nil
		}
	}()
	sigc := make(chan os.Signal, 2)
	signal.Notify(sigc, os.Interrupt, syscall.SIGTERM)
	defer signal.Stop(sigc)
	go func() {
		<-sigc
		cancel()
		<-sigc
		os.Exit(1)
	}()

	// Providers
	assetCompiled, err := assetmapper.Build([]assetmapper.Root{
		{FS: shared.Assets, Dir: "assets"},
		{FS: web.Assets, Dir: "assets"},
	}, nil)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	sharedTemplates, err := templates.Load(shared.Templates, "templates", assetCompiled.FuncMap())
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	webHandlers := &web.Handlers{
		Templates: sharedTemplates,
	}

	r := router.New()

	// Register
	r.Handle("/assets/", assetCompiled.Handler())
	r.Method("GET", "/{$}", webHandlers.Home)

	errc := make(chan error, 1)
	go func() { errc <- HTTPServer(ctx, r) }()
	var result error
	for range 1 {
		if e := <-errc; e != nil && !errors.Is(e, context.Canceled) && result == nil {
			result = e
			cancel()
		}
	}
	return result
}

func HTTPServer(ctx context.Context, r *router.Router) error {
	addr := ":8080"
	if p := os.Getenv("PORT"); p != "" {
		addr = ":" + p
	}
	srv := &http.Server{Addr: addr}
	srv.Handler = r
	errc := make(chan error, 1)
	go func() {
		if srv.TLSConfig != nil {
			errc <- srv.ListenAndServeTLS("", "")
		} else {
			errc <- srv.ListenAndServe()
		}
	}()
	select {
	case err := <-errc:
		if errors.Is(err, http.ErrServerClosed) {
			return nil
		}
		return err
	case <-ctx.Done():
	}
	shutdownCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 30*time.Second)
	defer cancel()
	return srv.Shutdown(shutdownCtx)
}
